description.description: A short description of the repository.

auto_init.description: Pass true to create an initial commit with empty README.

gitignore_template.description: Desired language or platform .gitignore template to apply.

license_template.description: Choose an open source license template that best suits your needs.

has_issues.description: Either true to enable issues for this repository or false to disable them.

has_projects.description: Either true to enable projects for this repository or false to disable them.

has_wiki.description: Either true to enable the wiki for this repository or false to disable it.
